chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3446 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.14477/2021 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for respondent No.2 Petitioner remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
